---
title: "Notes"
listing:
  contents: notes
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Working notes on things I'm learning, whether that be statistics or just cool new R methods. Expect rough-around-the-edges.
